method.name: Out-of-fold case-mix benchmark
method.concentration_metric: Share of positive cost difference from top 10% of cases
method.interpretation: Differences are investigation signals, not proven waste or savings.

validation.aggregate_calibration: Overall expected totals calibrated to actual totals
